outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to strongly positive total GEX, promoting price pinning.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped between the 680 Call Wall and 668 Gamma Flip. Positive Total GEX (5.69B) indicates dealers are long gamma, which suppresses volatility and creates a magnetic pinning effect around the current spot price. Bearish skews and elevated put/call ratios across all expirations indicate strong hedging demand, establishing a defined range.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate; positive total GEX suppresses volatility, favoring mean-reversion towards key strikes.
outlook.summary: The market is stabilized by a highly positive GEX environment across all expiries. However, heavily bearish put/call ratios and a significantly lower Max Pain (583-590) create underlying downward attraction. Expect price to be magnetized towards the massive 600 support, while facing immediate resistance at 608 and a firm ceiling at the Monthly Gamma Flip near 615.

levels.motivazione: Massive Open Interest across all three expirations (0DTE, WEEKLY, MONTHLY) creates a structural magnet and formidable support just below spot.
Extremely heavy MONTHLY Put OI (75,447) acts as a definitive downside floor and major dealer hedge anchor.
Confluence of 0DTE and MONTHLY Call OI, aligning precisely with the MONTHLY Gamma Flip (614.29) to cap any upside movement.
Strong WEEKLY and MONTHLY Put OI combined with the MONTHLY Max Pain level (590.00), creating heavy downward attraction.
Top WEEKLY Call OI (14,897) provides immediate short-term resistance directly above the current spot price.
The 0DTE Gamma Flip level defining the intraday sentiment equilibrium and immediate directional pivot.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to strongly positive aggregate GEX across all expirations.
outlook.summary: The market is trading at the upper boundary of the dealer's pricing range, pinned between the massive 25000 and 25200 Call Walls. Total GEX is highly positive (2.54B), indicating a stable, range-bound environment where dealers actively suppress volatility. While 0DTE skew shows localized fear, the broader WEEKLY and MONTHLY skews are neutral. Expect price magnetism towards the 25000-25200 resistance cluster, while distant Max Pain levels provide a gravitational lower anchor.

levels.motivazione: Significant Call OI and high volume across 0DTE, WEEKLY, and MONTHLY expiries. Acts as the primary pinning level exactly at spot.

levels.motivazione: Triple expiry Call Wall alignment with massive 0DTE volume spike. Defines the absolute upper boundary of the current dealer range.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put OI in WEEKLY and MONTHLY expiries combined with structural Max Pain alignment. Ultimate downside defense anchor.
Precise alignment of 0DTE (24048) and MONTHLY (24063) Gamma Flip levels. Marks the critical equilibrium shift between positive and negative gamma regimes.
Dominant MONTHLY Call OI (4028) with 0DTE presence. Creates a secondary structural friction ceiling just above the Gamma Flip zone.
Significant WEEKLY Call concentration with active 0DTE volume. Acts as a local friction zone and short-term support if spot drops.
